div.h2: Thread-Safe Fixed-Block Allocator with Mutex Serialization
div.h3: Reference: Intel Memory Management Manual Vol 3.

div.p: Every return path MUST call pthread_mutex_unlock to avoid permanent deadlock of the pool.
Time: O(1) - List pop. Space: O(1) - Bitmap update. No linear scans required.
Performed AFTER unlock to minimize mutex hold time. Safely operates on local var.

g.title: Acquire exclusive lock. Thread blocks here if contested.
Invokes sbrk/mmap to expand physical backing.
Acquire exclusive lock. Thread blocks here if contested.
Invokes sbrk/mmap to expand physical backing.
